rows.label: tev066001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Da Naguth about the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Da Naguth if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Da Naguth about the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Da Naguth about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Da Naguth about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Da Naguth about the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0001
rows.name: A human? What business have you here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0002
rows.name: Have you come seeking revenge?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Know that we no longer serve the Growth,
and thus have no quarrel with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0004
rows.name:
But if you insist on a fight,
you will get one! ...Well? Why
do you not draw your weapon?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0009
rows.name:
We are the Larsians, human! Our strength
is legend! Our pride is endless![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0010
rows.name:
And impoverished though we may
be, we do not want your aid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0015
rows.name:
The cold-blooded scoundrels think only of
increasing Samaar's territory. Their members
scheme and plot with no compunction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0016
rows.name:
And yet we joined them in their wretched acts...
Though circumstances forced our decision, these
sins still weigh heavy on my heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0017
rows.name:
I will strike them all down someday,
even if it costs me my life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0021
rows.name:
If Prince Jiarg has forged an alliance
with you, then it is for us to obey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0022
rows.name:
My siblings and I are the Three Talons!
Send us against the Growth, and we shall
annihilate them like Larsians possessed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG0023
rows.name:
You will see when the time comes.
No human can fight the way we do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1001
rows.name:
I saw your battle with that wretched
queen jacul, [ST:playername ]. You fought brilliantly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1002
rows.name:
In fact, I have never seen a
warrior fight with such ferocity
even among my own people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1003
rows.name:
I am honored to have joined
forces with you. May we meet
again on some other battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1004
rows.name:
Next time, it will be Da Naguth,
Cutting Wind of the Three Talons,
who rescues YOU from danger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1009
rows.name:
I thank you for bringing
the Growth to their end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1010
rows.name:
But it should have been the Larsians. We
must atone for the atrocities we inflicted
at their behest upon so many alien races.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1011
rows.name:
I hear many of the Growth's forces
continue to put up a fight in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066001_MSG1012
rows.name:
If nothing else, let my fellow
Larsians help you scatter
those fiends to the wind.[ST:wait ]
